bio.es: Fundadora de Girls Who Code, organización que ha enseñado programación a más de 500.000 niñas. Su TED Talk 'Teach girls bravery, not perfection' ha sido vista millones de veces. Abogada, política y activista, ha dedicado su carrera a cerrar la brecha de género en tecnología.
bio.en: Founder of Girls Who Code, an organization that has taught programming to over 500,000 girls. Her TED Talk 'Teach girls bravery, not perfection' has been viewed millions of times. Lawyer, politician, and activist, she has dedicated her career to closing the gender gap in technology.
